required_states: AWS Config enabled in source scope

conditions: AWS Config records the relevant data in source accounts and Regions and the aggregator is authorized.
decision_context: Use when centralized visibility is required without centralized mutation.
exclusions: Aggregation does not enable AWS Config recording or remediation in source accounts.

source_references.locator: Multi-Account Multi-Region Data Aggregation > Note following Use Cases
source_references.supported_proposition: Aggregation copies configuration and compliance data for viewing without source-account mutation.

statement: An AWS Config aggregator provides a read-only view of configuration and compliance data from authorized accounts and Regions and cannot deploy rules or mutate source accounts through the aggregator.
